description: Routes repo signals to specialized SKILL variants. Evaluated before mode routing in SKILL.md.

signalEvaluation.file_exists: Check if the file or glob pattern exists in REPO_DIR
signalEvaluation.dir_count: Count directories matching the glob pattern; match if count >= min
signalEvaluation.file_count: Count total files (excluding dirs in 'exclude' list); match if count <= max (inclusive)
signalEvaluation.no_key_framework: Check that no file matching any listed framework's detection pattern exists (e.g., next.config.*, vite.config.*, etc.)
signalEvaluation.script_output: Run the named script and check if the JSON output's key matches the expected value

variants.name: minimal
variants.description: Minimal projects with few files and no framework

variants.name: migration
variants.description: Repos with active migration signals (dual languages, deprecated markers, MIGRATION-PLAN.md)
